author: yusu
message:
feat(core)!: Refactor engine and modules; unify parsing and runtime APIs

- Refactor compileflow-core execution and model loading pipeline
- Unify BPMN/TBBPM parsers and runtime interfaces
- Introduce Spring Boot autoconfigure and starter
- Adjust Engine/Executor/Model APIs and package structure
- Remove deprecated extension points and configurations
- Expand integration tests and documentation

BREAKING CHANGE: Public APIs and package names have changed; follow the migration guide.
